design_reference: docs/design/11-impress-draw.md (11.4 presenter console / animation / transition surfaces)
note: Composition-pinning over the real, already-shipping upstream surfaces WIN-IM-004 owns, as pure static source/XML checks. It pins (1) the presenter console's genuine CppComponent registration; (2) the animation deck's GtkTreeView and the transition deck's GtkIconView content surfaces, each bound to its PanelLayout host; and it records an explicit, source-grounded absence marker that sd/source/console/* carries ZERO VCL widget-theme hooks today, because the presenter console renders through its own PresenterTheme bitmap/sprite pipeline entirely outside the VCL widget-draw/definition.xml path -- so no guarded-material-source triad is honestly available for presenter-console chrome. It also flags, without silently reconciling, the transition-gallery IconView-vs-design-grid mismatch and the presenter-console token-family-without-implemented-control gap. runtime_verified is false throughout: no native build, presenter pixels, animation/transition interaction, or UNO-tree evidence is claimed.

component.note: The inventory row's stale 'sdext; Material owner not assigned' note is corrected: the presenter console lives at sd/source/console/*, not sdext/ (which now holds only the PDF-import and PPT-minimizer modules).

console_absence.note: Point-in-time fact, asserted fail-closed: the presenter console has no VCL widget-theme hooks. If a future change adds such a guard without updating this row's documented architecture-divergence note, the checker surfaces the drift rather than silently passing or breaking. Comment/raw-string-stripped so a commented-out guard can neither satisfy nor break the marker.

transition_gallery.note: slidetransitionspanel.ui's transitions_icons is a GtkIconView (item-width 55, runtime-populated from TransitionPreset data), which does NOT match design 11.4's prose 'a grid of transition cells reusing the Layouts-panel cell pattern'. Flagged honestly as an open future icon-view-to-card-grid restyle, not a restatement of existing behaviour; the restyle is build-bound and not implemented.

presenter_console_chrome.note: Design 11.4's 'inverse-themed chrome matching the tooltip/snackbar family' names a real target token family (inverse-surface / on-inverse-surface, corner-small, stroke-none -- already implemented for the tooltip control in definition.xml) but NO implemented presenter-console control: the PresenterTheme bitmap/sprite pipeline (PresenterCanvas/PresenterSprite, not VCL DrawNativeControl) is architecturally outside VCL_FILE_WIDGET_THEME today. Theming it needs new archive-backed design authored first; this row does not invent it.

catalog_gap.note: Documents (does not close) a pre-existing gap in a different row's contract: 'Presenter Console' and 'Start Slide Show' are absent from the canonical site/prototype-features.json 2,433-row catalog (only 'Slide Transition' -> .uno:SlideChangeWindow resolves verbatim; 'Custom Animation' exists as 'Animation' -> .uno:CustomAnimation and 'Open the Custom Animation Deck' -> .uno:SidebarDeck.SdCustomAnimationDeck). Presenter Console dispatches via a com.sun.star.frame.ProtocolHandler rather than a plain .uno: command, so WIN-CONCEPT-001's '0 unresolved' catalog-contract claim never had to cover it. Flagged, not fixed by this row.
